backstory.original: Dashing Human Pirate Rogue Corazón de Ballena grew up as posh Percival Milquetoast, heir to the Milquetoast estate, but he left it all behind - partly for adventure on the high seas, partly to spite his terrible, terrible dad.  Corazón is on a long-term quest to save the former crew of his ship, The Joyful Damnation, from a curse that he is at least partially responsible for. In the short term, the Joyful Damnation has become the Oxventurers' preferred mode of transportation. Corazón likes to avoid getting his hands dirty, preferring to use fast talking, deception and sheer force of personality to get around trouble. If things come down to a fight, he likes to stay stealthy, hiding, or darting in to take on foes one on one like a true swashbuckler.  And if that fails he can always fall back on the old classic, Grease, the world's best spell. According to him, And only him.
backstory.display: 充满干劲的人类海盗游荡者科拉松·德巴伦纳的原名是帕西瓦尔·米尔克托斯特，是米尔克托斯特家族的继承人，但他将这一切都抛之脑后--部分原因是想出海冒险，另外一部分则是因为讨厌他那可恨的父亲。科拉松一直想为他的船--“欢乐毁灭号”的前船员们解除诅咒，因为他也该为这个诅咒付上那么一丁点的责任。就短期而言，欢乐毁灭号成了公牛冒险公会最爱的出行方式。科拉松不喜欢弄脏自己的手，更喜欢依靠巧舌如簧、欺诈和个人魅力来解决麻烦。如果到了必须要战斗的时候，他也喜欢躲在阴影里，然后冲上去像个真正的暴徒一样跟人一对一决斗。如果这一招也失败了，他还可以依赖全世界最优秀的经典魔法--油腻术。当然，这是他自己说的，也仅限于对他本人而言。

description.original: Corazón attacks a random enemy from the shadows.
description.display: 科拉松从暗影中随机攻击一名敌人。

longDescription.original: Corazón attacks a random enemy from the shadows.
longDescription.display: 科拉松从暗影中随机攻击一名敌人。

description.original: The joyful Damnation fires flaming cannonballs, igniting all current Grease puddles.
description.display: 欢乐毁灭号发射燃烧的炮弹，点燃所有油坑。

longDescription.original: Corazón's ship, the Joyful Damnation, fires flaming cannonballs from afar. This bombardment damages all enemies and lights all existing Grease puddles on fire for 30 seconds. Enemies in the flaming Grease puddles are dealt 1/30th of this ultimate's damage per second and take 100% more damage while the puddle is on fire.
longDescription.display: 科拉松的船“欢乐毁灭号”从远处发射燃烧的炮弹。这次轰炸对所有敌人造成伤害，并点燃所有现存的油坑，持续 30 秒。着火油坑中的敌人每秒受到该杀招 1/30 攻击力的伤害，并且在油坑着火时额外受到 100% 伤害。

description.desc: $(source_hero) increases the damage of all Neutral (Good/Evil axis) Champions in the formation by $(amount)%.
$(source_hero)会使阵型中所有中立（以善良/邪恶划分时）勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%。

tipText.original: Corazón increases the damage of all Neutral (Good/Evil axis) Champions in the formation
tipText.display: 科拉松会提高阵型中所有中立（以善良/邪恶划分时）勇士的伤害。

description.desc: Whenever $(source_hero) deals damage he leaves behind a moderately sized puddle of Grease under the enemy he attacked. Grease puddles do not hinder other Champions, but do slow enemies passing through them by $(amount)%. The maximum number of Grease puddles on the screen at once is equal to the number of Neutral (Good/Evil axis) Champions in the formation. The effects of Grease puddles stack multiplicatively if an enemy is standing in multiple puddles at once.^^Max Grease Puddles: $(corazon_max_grease_puddle_count)
每当$(source_hero)造成伤害时，他会在被攻击的敌人脚下留下一个中等大小的油坑。油坑不会妨碍其他勇士，但会使经过的敌人减速 $(amount)%。屏幕上同时存在的油坑最大数量等同于阵型中中立（以善良/邪恶划分时）勇士的数量。如果敌人同时踩在多个油坑中，其效果以乘算叠加。^^最大油坑数量：$(corazon_max_grease_puddle_count)

tipText.original: Corazón drops Grease puddles when he attacks, these impede all enemies who walk through them
tipText.display: 科拉松在攻击时会留下油坑，妨碍所有经过的敌人。

conditions.desc: All Champions not adjacent to $(source_hero) are treated as Neutral (Good/Evil axis) in addition to their actual alignment.
All Champions adjacent to $(source_hero) are treated as Neutral (Good/Evil axis) in addition to their actual alignment.
除原有实际阵营外，所有不与$(source_hero)相邻的勇士视为中立（以善良/邪恶划分时）阵营。
除原有实际阵营外，所有与$(source_hero)相邻的勇士视为中立（以善良/邪恶划分时）阵营。

description.desc: $(source_hero)'s Honorary Crewmates ability now affects all non-adjacent Champions instead of adjacent ones.
$(source_hero)的“荣誉船员”技能现在影响所有非相邻勇士而非相邻勇士。

specializationDescription.original: Corazón focuses on his bond with non adjacent champions.
specializationDescription.display: 科拉松专注于他与非相邻冠军的关系。

description.desc: Grease puddles now form under the furthest enemy from the formation instead of under the enemy attacked. Effect of the puddles is increased by $(amount)% multiplicitively.
油坑现在会在距离阵型最远的敌人脚下生成，而非被他攻击的敌人。油坑的效果提高 $(amount)%（乘算）。

specializationDescription.original: Corazón focuses on his Grease magic, stacking it as much as possible
specializationDescription.display: 科拉松专注于他的油脂魔法，尽可能多地堆积

description.desc: Increase the effect of Pirate's Code by $(amount)% each time $(source_hero) attacks, stacking additively. Lasts until Adventure Complete.
$(source_hero)每次发动攻击时，“海盗信条”的效果提高 $(amount)%（加算）。持续至冒险完成。

description.original: Yes. Quite. Of course. Where's the exit?
description.display: 是的。确实。当然可以。出口在哪里？

description.original: Would you expect any less from the captain of the Joyful Damnation!?
description.display: 欢乐毁灭号的船长总不会更糟糕吧！？

description.original: I won't be the first to lick the magical orb. Not again...
description.display: 我不做第一个舔魔法球的人。反正这次不行......

description.original: Have you checked if they're cursed yet? No reason, just curious.
description.display: 你检查过他们是不是被诅咒了吗？不为别的，就是好奇。

description.original: Did you consider GREASE? It always gets me out of trouble. Or into it. It depends.
description.display: 你考虑过油腻术吗？它总是能让我脱离麻烦。或者遇上麻烦。具体还得看情况。

description.original: These underdark names are quite exotic. Is that a double Z?
description.display: 这些幽暗地域的名字很有异国情调。那是两个 Z 吗？

description.original: I've been napping. What's going on now?
description.display: 我一直在打盹。现在是什么情况？

description.original: Ah, so you've heard of me?
description.display: 啊，你听说过我吗？

description.original: It cuts butter quite well. Care to see?
description.display: 用它来切黄油很不错。想看看吗？

description.original: If it wasn't for this, I'd still be holding my sword all weird.
description.display: 如果不是它，我握剑的姿势会很奇怪。

description.original: For whaling on people.
description.display: 用来砍人的。

description.original: I think this blade is speaking to me and - Oh! That's quite rude...
description.display: 我觉得这把剑在对我说话--噢！它太没礼貌了......

description.original: If I can find some gold paint, I can keep Dob from throwing our real coins in a lake.
description.display: 如果我能找些金漆，就可以让多比不要把真的金币扔进湖里了。

description.original: Just dig through them. You'll find the real coins below. Clever, eh?
description.display: 仔细翻一翻。你会在下面找到真正的金币。很聪明，对不对？

description.original: I don't know the exchange rate, but this seems like a lot.
description.display: 我不清楚汇率，不过这些看上去值不少钱。

name.original: Cursed Coins of the Lost Crew

description.original: If Curly Joe and the others could stop trying to kill me for five minutes, maybe I can finally rescue them.
description.display: 如果科里·乔和其他人能停下来五分钟不去想杀我这件事的话，说不定我就把他们救起来了。

description.original: I was just napping. Stop looking at me.
description.display: 我只是打个盹。别再看着我了。

description.original: It's like my old crew is always watching me.
description.display: 就像我的旧船员们一直在照看着我。

description.original: I, uh... won this in a game of chance from a snake priest! Yes.
description.display: 我，呃......它是从一个毒蛇牧师那里赌赢回来的！是的。

description.original: They each tell a story. Plus they look REALLY good.
description.display: 它们都有自己的故事。再说它们看起来都很漂亮。

description.original: It looks dashing, right? You can be honest.
description.display: 看起来很精神，对吧？你可以实话实说。

description.original: Do you have a drink called grog? I hear pirates drink it.
description.display: 你这里有掺水的烈酒吗？我听说海盗都喜欢喝。

description.original: And THAT is why Grease is the world's best spell. I'll hear no more on this topic.
description.display: 这就是为什么油腻术是世界上最好的魔法。我不想再谈论这个话题了。

description.original: Could someone else steer? I'm having trouble seeing past these feathers.
description.display: 能来个人掌舵吗？有这些羽毛在，我看不清东西了。

description.original: Is this all they had? They're so... basic.
description.display: 就这样了？它真是太......基础了。

description.original: I had to buy off the rack because the guy who makes the bespoke ones wasn't in that day.
description.display: 我只能买成品，因为做定制的人那天不在。

description.original: Let's see them try that again! Or let's maybe just avoid them next time.
description.display: 让他们再试试看！或者也许下次我们可以避开他们。

description.original: While you're shaking that person, could you also rob them for me?
description.display: 你们跟那家伙打起来的时候，能不能顺便把钱给我抢来？

description.original: I immediately hide.
description.display: 我立刻就藏起来了。

description.original: About the only good thing Dad ever did was buy this cloak.
description.display: 父亲做过唯一的一件好事就是买了这件斗篷。

description.original: Not sure about the swash, but it certainly has a lot of buckles.
description.display: 我不知道什么流氓，但它上面确实有很多扣环。

description.original: The Joyful Damnation is at your service! Unless you're poor. Or a villain, I guess.
description.display: 欢乐毁灭号为您效劳！如果你很穷就算了。好吧，你是坏蛋也不行。

effects.description: Increases the damage of all Champions by $amount%
Increases the damage of all Male Champions by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Human Champions by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion with a INT score of 11 or higher in the formation
Increases the damage of all Champions with a CHA score of 13 or higher by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Melee Champion in the formation

character_sheet_details.backstory: Dashing Human Pirate Rogue Corazón de Ballena grew up as posh Percival Milquetoast, heir to the Milquetoast estate, but he left it all behind - partly for adventure on the high seas, partly to spite his terrible, terrible dad.  Corazón is on a long-term quest to save the former crew of his ship, The Joyful Damnation, from a curse that he is at least partially responsible for. In the short term, the Joyful Damnation has become the Oxventurers' preferred mode of transportation. Corazón likes to avoid getting his hands dirty, preferring to use fast talking, deception and sheer force of personality to get around trouble. If things come down to a fight, he likes to stay stealthy, hiding, or darting in to take on foes one on one like a true swashbuckler.  And if that fails he can always fall back on the old classic, Grease, the world's best spell. According to him, And only him.
character_sheet_details.system_description: Corazón debuffs enemies with his Grease puddles which he can also ignite

character_sheet_details.system_description: 科拉松会用油坑阻碍敌人，他还能点燃油坑

display.name: 装饰剑

original.name: Gilded Practice Sword
original.description: If it wasn't for this, I'd still be holding my sword all weird.

display.name: 镀金练习用剑
display.description: 如果不是它，我握剑的姿势会很奇怪。

original.name: de Ballena's Cutlass
original.description: For whaling on people.

display.name: 德巴伦纳的短剑
display.description: 用来砍人的。

original.name: Ancient Cavalier Cutlass

display.name: 上古骑士短剑
display.description: 我觉得这把剑在对我说话--噢！它太没礼貌了......

original.name: Play Coins
original.description: If I can find some gold paint, I can keep Dob from throwing our real coins in a lake.

display.name: 游戏钱币
display.description: 如果我能找些金漆，就可以让多比不要把真的金币扔进湖里了。

display.name: 木质钱币

display.name: 失落者被诅咒的钱币
display.description: 如果科里·乔和其他人能停下来五分钟不去想杀我这件事的话，说不定我就把他们救起来了。

original.name: Judgy Ring

display.name: 审视戒指
display.description: 我只是打个盹。别再看着我了。

original.name: Watchful Ring
original.description: It's like my old crew is always watching me.

display.name: 看护之戒
display.description: 就像我的旧船员们一直在照看着我。

original.name: Serpent Ring
original.description: I, uh... won this in a game of chance from a snake priest! Yes.

display.name: 毒蛇戒指
display.description: 我，呃......它是从一个毒蛇牧师那里赌赢回来的！是的。

original.name: Regal Rings of the Corsair
original.description: They each tell a story. Plus they look REALLY good.

display.name: 海盗的王者之戒
display.description: 它们都有自己的故事。再说它们看起来都很漂亮。

original.name: Rogue's Cap
original.description: It looks dashing, right? You can be honest.

display.name: 游荡者兜帽
display.description: 看起来很精神，对吧？你可以实话实说。

original.name: Pirate Hat
original.description: Do you have a drink called grog? I hear pirates drink it.

display.name: 海盗帽
display.description: 你这里有掺水的烈酒吗？我听说海盗都喜欢喝。

original.name: Captain's Hat
original.description: And THAT is why Grease is the world's best spell. I'll hear no more on this topic.

display.name: 船长帽
display.description: 这就是为什么油腻术是世界上最好的魔法。我不想再谈论这个话题了。

original.name: Joyful Damnation's Regalia
original.description: Could someone else steer? I'm having trouble seeing past these feathers.

display.name: 欢乐毁灭号徽章
display.description: 能来个人掌舵吗？有这些羽毛在，我看不清东西了。

original.name: Solid Boots
original.description: Is this all they had? They're so... basic.

display.name: 硬质靴子
display.description: 就这样了？它真是太......基础了。

original.name: Travelling Boots
original.description: I had to buy off the rack because the guy who makes the bespoke ones wasn't in that day.

display.name: 旅行靴子
display.description: 我只能买成品，因为做定制的人那天不在。

original.name: Armored Knee Boots
original.description: Let's see them try that again! Or let's maybe just avoid them next time.

display.name: 披甲过膝靴
display.description: 让他们再试试看！或者也许下次我们可以避开他们。

original.name: Commander's Boots
original.description: While you're shaking that person, could you also rob them for me?

display.name: 指挥官之靴
display.description: 你们跟那家伙打起来的时候，能不能顺便把钱给我抢来？

original.name: Stealthy Overcoat
original.description: I immediately hide.

display.name: 潜行大衣
display.description: 我立刻就藏起来了。

original.name: Milquetoast's Cloak
original.description: About the only good thing Dad ever did was buy this cloak.

display.name: 米尔克托斯特的斗篷
display.description: 父亲做过唯一的一件好事就是买了这件斗篷。

original.name: Swashbuckler's Coat
original.description: Not sure about the swash, but it certainly has a lot of buckles.

display.name: 流氓外衣
display.description: 我不知道什么流氓，但它上面确实有很多扣环。

original.name: Captain's Coat
original.description: The Joyful Damnation is at your service! Unless you're poor. Or a villain, I guess.

display.name: 船长外衣
display.description: 欢乐毁灭号为您效劳！如果你很穷就算了。好吧，你是坏蛋也不行。

effects.description: Increases the damage of all Champions by $amount%
使所有勇士的伤害提高 $amount%
Increases the damage of all Male Champions by $(amount)%
使所有男性勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Human Champions by $(amount)%
使所有人类勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion with a INT score of 11 or higher in the formation
阵型中每有一位智力大于等于 11 的勇士，所有勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions with a CHA score of 13 or higher by $(amount)%
使所有魅力大于等于 13 的勇士伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Melee Champion in the formation
阵型中每有一位近战勇士，所有勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
